task: Using only the embedded packet provided in the task, (1) classify the health of each ADCS sensor (ST1, ST2, Gyro1, Gyro2) against the stated limits; (2) recommend the ADCS operating mode (safe_hold, single_tracker, gyro_blend) with rationale; and (3) produce clear fault-isolation logic that supports the recommendation. Deliver an Excel workbook (adcs_fault_isolation.xlsx) that contains executable formulas or logic, step-by-step intermediate calculations with row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, and sensitivity checks around controlling thresholds; and a flight operations memo (flight_ops_memo.md) that summarizes findings, the decision table (pass/warn/fail/needs_review), and operational recommendations. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions.
